FROM NATIONAL COUNCIL OF STATE HOUSING A: Did not search for farmers/ranchers because these loans are for the business, not farmworker homes.
Most states combine additional assistance for down payments or closing costs with government loans.
Most states focus on income level, rather than house location. These types of financial assistance can be applied in both urban and rural areas and are not rural specific
Some states produce documentation and research about the rural housing stock or rural homelessness but do not have specific programs in place to improve rural housing.
Most financing and funding for rural housing comes from or through USDA RD.
